title: cyclosorus adenophorus
intro: Cyclosorus adenophorus is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the Adenophorus fern. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Cyclosorus adenophorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic benefits.
